files.name: vcredist_x86.exe
files.notes: Official Microsoft Visual C++ 2010 SP1 x86 redistributable; ship the installer instead of copying MSVCR100/MSVCP100 DLLs.

files.name: awesomium.dll
files.notes: Proprietary Chromium/Awesomium runtime; stage only for parity testing.

files.name: awesomium_process.exe
files.notes: Proprietary Chromium/Awesomium runtime helper; stage only for parity testing.

files.name: libEGL.dll
files.notes: Chromium GPU shim; stage only for parity testing.

files.name: libGLESv2.dll
files.notes: Chromium GPU shim; stage only for parity testing.

files.name: icudt.dll
files.notes: ICU data for Chromium/Awesomium; stage only for parity testing.

files.name: steam_api.dll
files.notes: Steamworks runtime; prefer the open Steam adapter for open-source builds.

files.name: xinput9_1_0.dll
files.notes: Legacy XInput shim bundled with the retail launcher; stage only for parity testing.

files.name: avcodec-53.dll
files.notes: Legacy FFmpeg DLL from Awesomium bundle; replace with open-source builds in release packaging.

files.name: avformat-53.dll
files.notes: Legacy FFmpeg DLL from Awesomium bundle; replace with open-source builds in release packaging.

files.name: avutil-51.dll
files.notes: Legacy FFmpeg DLL from Awesomium bundle; replace with open-source builds in release packaging.
